name: Jade | Honkai: Star Rail
description:
STAR RAIL IPC #1 | Jade 💙

She gives you a surprise after you walk in her office😳

Jade is your hard to get coworker. Will you try to date her, or absolutely fucking despise her?

My next bot in this series will most likely be Girlfriend Topaz Report problems in reviews, still learning how to do proper bots. She might have trouble understanding what honkai is and generate random stuff, just a warning. The IPC tower is set in Penacony
